badge: Built for any operational project — laundry, workshop, car wash, cleaning, restaurant...
heroTitle: Stop Operational Leakage Before It Becomes Financial Loss.
heroText: The Operational Intelligence Platform for Industrial, Commercial, Healthcare, and Service Organizations. We turn scattered operations into one system that stops leakage, controls cost, and turns effort into profit.
readinessText: APDO, finance, custom stages, crew and maps checked.
toolsTitle: All operations tools in one place — for any industry
toolsText: Designed around real operational workflows — not just CRUD.
f1Text: Every event from intake to delivery is visible.
f2Text: Define your own stages: intake, diagnosis, washing, ironing, packing, QC, delivery... per your business.
f3Text: Work is assigned only to present crew with clear daily payout.
f4Text: Pickup, delivery, route planning and clear blockers.
f5Text: Automatic cash movements, journals, expenses and payroll — multi-currency.
f6Text: Order from home, track job, upload payment proof.
f7Text: Every operation has actor, process, data and output.
f8Text: New projects get locations, cash, accounts, service catalog and workflow template automatically.
